settings.heading: Delivery timing depends on product availability and order details
settings.intro: For wholesale and sourcing requests, delivery timing is reviewed based on product category, quantity, supplier availability, and destination.
settings.body:
GlobiSun reviews shipping and lead time on a case-by-case basis for B2B orders. Larger quantities, custom kits, or special sourcing requests may require additional preparation time.

To help us estimate timing

  • Include your delivery ZIP code
  • Share the quantity and product category
  • Tell us your required delivery date
  • Note whether substitutes or similar products are acceptable

Shipping costs, free-shipping eligibility, and delivery method may depend on order size and destination.

Rush requests

Urgent orders should clearly include the target delivery date and whether substitute products are acceptable. Rush feasibility is reviewed by product category and destination.

Large or custom orders

Orders requiring kitting, special quantities, or supplier sourcing may require additional preparation time before shipment.
settings.cta_heading: Send us your product list or sourcing request.
settings.cta_text: We can review product category, quantity, lead time, and suitable B2B options.

settings.title: Delivery ZIP matters
settings.text: Shipping options and costs can change by destination.

settings.title: Quantity matters
settings.text: Large and custom orders may require additional coordination.

settings.title: Timeline matters
settings.text: Tell us your target date so we can review feasibility.
